criteria.rule: Zero CDN — no external font, image, or JS resources from third-party domains
criteria.check: grep for http:// https:// in all .html and .css files — only internal /generated/ paths allowed

criteria.rule: Every page body has ≥ 500 characters of visible text content
criteria.check: Strip HTML tags from each page, count visible characters

criteria.rule: All JS animation uses forEach(el => obs.observe(el)) pattern
criteria.check: Search for IntersectionObserver usage in all .html files

criteria.rule: All references match entries in generated/image-manifest.json
criteria.check: Extract all src attributes, compare against manifest keys

criteria.rule: All images are local .webp format under /generated/
criteria.check: Verify all img src end with .webp and start with /generated/

criteria.rule: Contact form contains only name, email, message fields — no extra fields
All navigation links point to valid pages, not anchors
criteria.check: Extract all <a href> in nav, verify each target file exists

criteria.rule: Each page has unique <title> and <meta description>
criteria.check: Compare title and description across all pages

criteria.rule: Every page has ≥ 1 real CTA (button or link to /contact/)
criteria.check: Search for href=/contact/ and btn-primary in each page
grep for design-tokens.css in all page <link> tags
